name: Asparagus Risotto
recipeIngredient: 3-5 cups broth (or water with a bullion cube added)
8 sun-dried tomatoes, not packed in oil
1 cup dried shitake mushrooms (or your favorite dried variety)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the shitake mushrooms in hot water for 15 minutes, ensuring they are submerged. Drain and roughly chop the mushrooms.
2. Chop asparagus into 1-inch pieces. Chop onion.
3. In a large pot, sauté onion in a bit of water for a minute or two.
4. Add garlic and diced sun-dried tomatoes to the pot with a splash of red wine or sherry. Cook for 5 minutes until the onion is soft.
5. Stir in rice and cook for about 1 minute, then deglaze the pan with half a cup of broth.
6. Bring the liquid to a simmer over medium heat and stir constantly. When most of the liquid is absorbed, add an additional half cup.
7. Continue adding water in half-cup increments, stirring constantly until the asparagus is cooked through.
8. Season with salt and pepper. Serve immediately.
